name: release-publish
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo |
 policy: evidence,safety-gates,quality-gates{docs,tests,surface-sync,release},approval-gates{explicit,no-fallback},deterministic-output |
 lens: release-gatekeeper |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: SOURCE_BRANCH
required_inputs.description: Branch that holds the validated release candidate changes.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_BRANCH
required_inputs.description: Branch that should receive the release-only commit.

required_inputs.name: RELEASE_TAG
required_inputs.description: Explicit tag to publish, such as v1.2.0.

required_inputs.name: REQUIRED_CHECKS
required_inputs.description: Checks that must pass before the release branch and tag are mutated.

required_inputs.name: PUBLISH_TARGET
required_inputs.description: Whether to stop at a local tag, push a tag only, or publish a GitHub release.

required_inputs.name: REMOTE_NAME
required_inputs.description: Remote to push the release branch and tag to. Default is origin.

required_inputs.name: LEGACY_CLEANUP_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Optional cleanup expectations such as removed legacy skills, deleted stale docs, temporary implementation-doc removal, or public-surface sync.

required_inputs.name: RELEASE_NOTES_SOURCE
required_inputs.description: How release notes should be sourced.

required_inputs.name: RELEASE_NOTES_PATH
required_inputs.description: Path to release notes when using path mode.
